text: What is the primary purpose of the LLM in this system?
rationale: Determines the operational role of the LLM.

text: Who can directly interact with the LLM system?
rationale: Identifies actors interacting with the LLM.

text: Through which interfaces is the LLM accessible?
rationale: Identifies entry points exposing the LLM.

text: What are the primary sources of input data for the LLM?
rationale: Identifies main input sources feeding the LLM.

text: What types of external or untrusted content can be ingested by the LLM?
rationale: Determines whether untrusted content can influence the model context.

text: What processing steps occur before user input reaches the LLM?
rationale: Reveals intermediate pipeline nodes before the LLM.

text: Which data sources are connected to the LLM via retrieval or RAG mechanisms?
rationale: Identifies retrieval pipelines and data sources.

text: Which internal services are allowed to call the LLM?
rationale: Determines which internal services interact with the model.

text: Does the system store conversation history or memory for the LLM?
rationale: Identifies memory storage and persistence.

text: Is there an orchestration layer coordinating LLM interactions?
rationale: Identifies orchestration components.

text: Does the LLM have access to internal services or tools?
rationale: Determines access to internal systems.

text: Which data storage systems are accessible to the LLM pipeline?
rationale: Identifies storage nodes used by the pipeline.

text: Can the LLM initiate calls to external services or APIs?
rationale: Determines external service interaction.

text: What types of actions can the LLM trigger or influence?
rationale: Identifies automated actions triggered by the LLM.

text: Where is the LLM hosted?
rationale: Identifies hosting environment.

text: Does the system use multiple LLM models for different tasks?
rationale: Identifies multi-model routing.

text: How are LLM prompts or system instructions managed?
rationale: Determines prompt management approach.

text: Can users influence system prompts or instructions indirectly?
rationale: Identifies indirect prompt manipulation.

text: What output formats are produced by the LLM?
rationale: Determines output types affecting downstream systems.

text: Where is LLM output rendered or consumed?
rationale: Identifies where model outputs are consumed.

text: Which trust boundaries does user input cross before reaching the LLM?
options: Internal network to secure data stores
rationale: Identifies trust boundaries for DFD generation.
